description: A manifest for a category bundle of ready-to-used workflows

name.description: A short name for what category is. Can be used in filtering.

description.description: A description of what the category contains.

entries.description: A list of workflow bundles included in this category

name.description: The name of the workflow bundle

path.description: The relative path to the workflow bundle .zip. MUST END IN .zip

description.description: A short description of the workflow bundle.

integrations.description: An array of the names of Integration bundles that are used in this workflow bundle.

tags.description: An array of tags applied to the bundle. Used to match the entry to a tag filter.

certified.description: Denotes if the workflow bundle .zip is IBM Certified.
